title: Ability to override the including weekends as available timeline days at the Board level without changing the orgainization defaul
excerpt: We would like to keep the Admin level setting to exclude weekends in available dates and timelines.  However, I have a specific project that needs to have non-workdays (weekends) available to set tasks.  I would like the…

posts.author: rbrodhagen (Richard Brodhagen)
posts.cookedHtml: We would like to keep the Admin level setting to exclude weekends in available dates and timelines. However, I have a specific project that needs to have non-workdays (weekends) available to set tasks. I would like the ability to override the default at the board level so I can have weekends available only for specific projects.

posts.author: Harry123 (Horia)
posts.cookedHtml: Really need this too. We want to track working days as Monday to Friday, but we also have a board to track filming days which can land on weekends.

posts.author: PetraD (Petra)
posts.cookedHtml: I need this as well. In general, our Project Plans skip weekends, but when we set up a board for an IT deployment plan, we need to be able to include the weekend days. Has there been an update or any feedback on this request?

posts.author: Lea7 (Lea)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be extremely useful (even a “must have”) for IT projects where deployment takes place over the weekends.
